heading: Approval of installations by Commission
label: 356 Approval of installations by Commission
notes: References in TextThis part, referred to in text, commences with .section 351 of this title
Amendments1994— struck out “(a)” before “Insofar as”.Pub. L. 103–414
Effective DateSection effective , see section 16 of act , set out as a note under .May 20, 1937May 20, 1937section 351 of this title
amendments: Amendments1994— struck out “(a)” before “Insofar as”.Pub. L. 103–414

children.text: To approve the details as to the location and manner of installations of the equipment required by this part or of equipment necessitated by reason of the purposes and requirements of this part.
To approve installations, apparatus, and spare parts necessary to comply with the purposes and requirements of this part.

To prescribe such additional equipment as may be determined to be necessary to supplement that specified in this part, for the proper functioning of the radio installation installed in accordance with this part or for the proper conduct of radio communication in time of emergency or distress.
